title: Per-task model routing
description: Maps the three §1 roles (planner / executor / critic) to provider+model strings. Lives at `<repo>/.atelier/routing.json` (per-repo, takes precedence) or `~/.atelier/routing.json` (global fallback). When absent, all roles default to the user's configured default executor; the critic is `null` (matches §10's 'off by default').

executor.description: Required. Runs the §2.5 agent loop turn-by-turn; emits the §2 envelope.

planner.description: If null (default), the executor doubles as the planner. When set, the planner runs once at task start to emit a `plan_update` envelope; the executor takes over for the actual edits.

critic.description: If null (default), no critic runs — matches §10's 'background critic off by default'. When set, runs against each turn's output and emits an advisory envelope into a side pane; does not gate the §2.5 state machine.

model_ref.description: Format: '<provider>:<model_id>'. Provider names must match a registered §1 adapter (e.g., `anthropic`, `openai`, `litellm`, `ollama`, `mlx`, `llamacpp`). Model IDs are provider-specific (e.g., `anthropic:claude-sonnet-4-6`, `ollama:qwen2.5-coder:7b`).
